claim: Quantum is far better calibrated (ECE 0.020 vs 0.276)
note: The 0.276 figure is the UNCALIBRATED classical (raw). With classical given its own temperature the ECE gap shrinks from 0.256 (raw) to 0.007 (fair). The prior benchmark scaled only the quantum logits.
